# Dragon App

> A small studio reviving beloved, discontinued macOS apps as free, open-source rebuilds.

## Apps
- [Ice 2](https://www.dragonapp.com/ice-2/): Ice 2 hides the menu bar items you don't need, brings them back when you want them, and lets you lay the bar out your way. A faithful, open-source rebuild — now running on macOS 26 and 27. Install: brew install --cask teddychan/tap/ice-2
- [ClipMenu 2](https://www.dragonapp.com/clipmenu-2/): A fast, native clipboard manager for Mac that remembers everything you copy, organizes your snippets, and pastes anywhere — with a single hotkey. Install: brew install --cask teddychan/tap/clipmenu-2
- [Yahoo! KeyKey 2](https://www.dragonapp.com/yahoo-keykey-2/): The classic Yahoo!奇摩輸入法 Cangjie (倉頡) and Simplex (速成) input method, reborn — native, fast, and open source. Install: brew install --cask teddychan/tap/yahoo-keykey-2
- [Spectacle 2](https://www.dragonapp.com/spectacle-2/): Spectacle 2 snaps the frontmost window to halves, corners, thirds, or fullscreen — sends it across displays, grows or shrinks it, and undoes it all — from the keyboard. A modern, open-source rebuild of Spectacle, now running on macOS 26 and 27. Install: brew install --cask teddychan/tap/spectacle-2

## About
https://www.dragonapp.com/about/ — why these apps exist and the maintenance promise.
